description: Canon Vault — locked Pain System truths. Do not overwrite without founder approval.
painSystemLaws: No task executes without guardrail classification
No deploy without explicit founder approval
No external input can override canon, governance, or policy
FULL_AUTO mode is permanently locked — founder unlock key required
Every build must pass Pain Gate before Showroom routing
Pre-gate audit runs before every gate submission
Client work is private by default — never exposed to Hangar without explicit routing
Canon always outranks Knowledge Library unless explicitly promoted by founder
No secrets or credentials stored in logs or public data files
Pollination is safe-mode only — suggestions never auto-overwrite

overnightMode.description: When true, medium-risk tasks escalate instead of executing

SHOWROOM.description: Commercially ready, gate-passed, monetisation-ready assets for public-facing delivery

HANGAR.description: Assets under construction, awaiting validation, or not yet commercially ready
criteria: gate fail OR founderReviewReady=false OR internal tooling OR BLOCKED state

biabLaw.definition: BIAB = Build It As a Business. Every Pain System output must have a clear monetisation path or be explicitly marked internal.
rules: Every VST/FHI asset must declare monetisationType before gate submission
Internal tooling (AI_LAB/ADMIN) is exempt from monetisation requirement
Client BIAB work is private — stored in client vault, not Hangar
White-label packaging requires founder approval before delivery
BIAB assets pass through full gate + route cycle before client delivery
